svg.text: · Multi-hop reasoning: "Address of the hospital where my dentist works" = User → Dr. Zhang-A → Renai Stomatology Hospital → Address, traversing relation edges hop by hop

text.font-family: Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: · Entity disambiguation: Two doctors with the same name "Dr. Zhang" are different nodes in the graph, distinguished by their respective relation edges (Dentistry / Cardiology). Each edge = a triple (subject-relation-object)
